name: TestEnforceMPP
cases: select @@tidb_allow_mpp
select @@tidb_enforce_mpp
select @@tidb_opt_tiflash_concurrency_factor
set @@tidb_allow_mpp=0
explain format='verbose' select count(*) from t where a=1
explain format='verbose' select /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t]) */ count(*) from t where a=1
explain format='verbose' select /*+ read_from_storage(tiflash[t]) */ count(*) from t where a=1
set @@tidb_allow_mpp=1;
set @@tidb_enforce_mpp=0;
explain format='verbose' select count(*) from t where a=1
explain format='verbose' select /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t]) */ count(*) from t where a=1
explain format='verbose' select /*+ read_from_storage(tiflash[t]) */ count(*) from t where a=1
set @@tidb_opt_tiflash_concurrency_factor = 1000000
explain format='verbose' select count(*) from t where a=1
explain format='verbose' select /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t]) */ count(*) from t where a=1
explain format='verbose' select /*+ read_from_storage(tiflash[t]) */ count(*) from t where a=1
set @@tidb_enforce_mpp=1;
explain format='verbose' select count(*) from t where a=1
explain format='verbose' select /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t]) */ count(*) from t where a=1
explain format='verbose' select /*+ read_from_storage(tiflash[t]) */ count(*) from t where a=1
explain format = 'plan_tree' select  /*+ READ_FROM_STORAGE(TIFLASH[s]) */ a from s where a = 10 and b is null; -- index path huristic rule will prune tiflash path
explain format = 'plan_tree' select /*+ read_from_storage(tiflash[t3]) */ * from t3 where sala='a' and id =1; -- once hinted, walk with tiflash range scan
explain format = 'plan_tree' select * from t3 where sala='a' and id =1; -- once not hinted, walk with tikv point get

name: TestEnforceMPPWarning1
cases: set @@tidb_allow_mpp=1;set @@tidb_enforce_mpp=1;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(*) from t where a=1 -- 1. no replica
cmd: create-replica
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(*) from t where a=1 -- 2. replica not ready
cmd: enable-replica
set @@session.tidb_isolation_read_engines = 'tikv';
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(*) from t where a=1 -- 3. isolation_engine not match
set @@session.tidb_isolation_read_engines = 'tikv, tiflash';
explain format = 'plan_tree' select /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t]) */ count(*) from t where a=1 -- 4. hint use tikv
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT a, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a) FROM t; -- 5. window unsupported
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT t1.b FROM t t1 join t t2 where t1.a=t2.a; -- 6. virtual column
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT count(b) from t where a=1; -- 7. agg func has virtual column
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT count(*) from t group by b; -- 8. group by virtual column
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT count(a) from t group by md5(a); -- 10. scalar func not supported
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT count(a) from t where c=1; -- 11. type not supported
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT count(a) from t where d=1; -- 11.1. type not supported

name: TestEnforceMPPWarning2
cases: set @@tidb_allow_mpp=1;set @@tidb_enforce_mpp=1;
set @@tidb_partition_prune_mode=static;
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT count(*) from t where a=1; -- 1. static partition prune
set @@tidb_partition_prune_mode=dynamic;

name: TestEnforceMPPWarning3
cases: set @@tidb_allow_mpp=1;set @@tidb_enforce_mpp=1;set @@tidb_hash_exchange_with_new_collation=0;
cmd: enable-new-collation
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT count(*) from t group by b; -- 1. new collation FIXME
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT * from t t1 join t t2 on t1.b=t2.b; -- 2. new collation FIXME

name: TestEnforceMPPWarning4
cases: set @@tidb_allow_mpp=1;set @@tidb_enforce_mpp=1; -- test joins
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT /*+ MERGE_JOIN(t,s) */ * from t join s using(a); -- 1. hint use MERGE_JOIN
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT /*+ INL_JOIN(t,s) */ * from t, s where t.a=s.a; -- 2. hint use INL_JOIN
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT /*+ INL_HASH_JOIN(t,s) */ * from t join s using(a); -- 3. hint use INL_HASH_JOIN
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT /*+ HASH_JOIN(t,s) */ * from t join s using(a); -- 4. hint use INL_JOIN
set @@tidb_opt_broadcast_cartesian_join = 0
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT * from t join s; -- 5. cartesian join, cartesian banned.
set @@tidb_broadcast_join_threshold_size = 0; set @@tidb_opt_broadcast_cartesian_join = 1
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT * from t join s; -- 6. cartesian join, broadcast banned.
set @@tidb_broadcast_join_threshold_size = 104857600; set @@tidb_opt_broadcast_cartesian_join = 1
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT * from t join s; -- can use mpp
set @@tidb_broadcast_join_threshold_size = 0; set @@tidb_opt_broadcast_cartesian_join = 2
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT * from t join s; -- can use mpp
set @@tidb_broadcast_join_threshold_size = 104857600; set @@tidb_opt_broadcast_cartesian_join = 1;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t where t.a>1 or t.a in (select a from t); -- 7. left outer semi join
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t where t.a>1 or t.a not in (select a from t); -- now it's supported -- 8. anti left outer semi join
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a from t where t.a not in (select a from s where t.a<1); -- 9. non left join has left conditions

name: TestMPP2PhaseAggPushDown
cases: set @@tidb_allow_mpp=1;set @@tidb_enforce_mpp=1;set @@tidb_opt_agg_push_down=1;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(*) from c, o where c.c_id=o.c_id; -- 1. test agg push down, scalar aggregate
explain format = 'plan_tree' select o.o_id, count(*) from c, o where c.c_id=o.c_id group by o.o_id; -- 2. test agg push down, group by non-join column
explain format = 'plan_tree' select o.c_id, count(*) from c, o where c.c_id=o.c_id group by o.c_id; -- 3. test agg push down, group by join column
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a, count(*) from (select a, b from t union all select a, b from t) t group by a order by a limit 10

name: TestMPPSkewedGroupDistinctRewrite
cases: set @@tidb_allow_mpp=1;set @@tidb_enforce_mpp=1;set @@tidb_opt_skew_distinct_agg=1;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct c) from t group by d;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct c), count(a) from t group by d;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct c) from t group by b+d;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct c) from t group by b+d, a+b;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct c), count(*) from t group by date_format(d,'%Y');
explain format = 'plan_tree' select date_format(d,'%Y') as df, sum(a), count(b), count(distinct c) from t group by date_format(d,'%Y');
explain format = 'plan_tree' select d, count(distinct c), sum(a), max(b), count(*) from t group by d;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select date_format(d,'%Y') as df, count(distinct c) from t group by date_format(d,'%Y');
explain format = 'plan_tree' select date_format(d,'%Y') as df, a, count(b), count(distinct c) from t group by date_format(d,'%Y'), a;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select date_format(d,'%Y') as df, a, count(b), avg(distinct c) from t group by date_format(d,'%Y'), a;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select d,e, min(b), count(distinct c), bit_or(a) from t group by e,d; -- bit agg func can't be pushed to TiFlash
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a, count(b), avg(distinct c), count(distinct c) from t group by a; -- multi distinct funcs, bail out
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(b), count(distinct c) from t; -- single distinct func but no group key, bail out

name: TestMPPSingleDistinct3Stage
cases: set @@tidb_allow_mpp=1;set @@tidb_enforce_mpp=1;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct b) from t;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct c) from t;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct e) from t;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a,b,c,e) from t;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct c), count(a), count(*) from t;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select sum(b), count(a), count(*), count(distinct c) from t;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select sum(b+a), count(*), count(distinct c), count(a) from t having count(distinct c) > 2;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select sum(b+a), count(*), count(a) from t having count(distinct c) > 2;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select sum(b+a), max(b), count(distinct c), count(*) from t having count(a) > 2;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select sum(b), count(distinct a, b, e), count(a+b) from t;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct b), json_objectagg(d,c) from t;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct c+a), count(a) from t;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select sum(b), count(distinct c+a, b, e), count(a+b) from t;

name: TestMPPMultiDistinct3Stage
cases: explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a) from t
select count(distinct a) from t
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a), count(distinct b) from t
select count(distinct a), count(distinct b) from t
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a), count(distinct b), count(c) from t
select count(distinct a), count(distinct b), count(c) from t
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a), count(distinct b), count(c+1) from t
select count(distinct a), count(distinct b), count(c+1) from t
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a), count(distinct b), sum(c) from t
select count(distinct a), count(distinct b), sum(c) from t
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a, b), count(distinct b), count(c), sum(d) from t
select count(distinct a, b), count(distinct b), count(c), sum(d) from t
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a+b), sum(c) from t
select count(distinct a+b), sum(c) from t
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a+b), count(distinct b+c), count(c) from t
select count(distinct a+b), count(distinct b+c), count(c) from t
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a,c), count(distinct b,c), count(c) from t
select count(distinct a), count(distinct b), count(*) from t
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a), count(distinct b), count(*) from t
select count(distinct a), count(distinct b), avg(c+d) from t
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(distinct a), count(distinct b), avg(c+d) from t

name: TestMPPNullAwareSemiJoinPushDown
cases: set @@tidb_allow_mpp=1;set @@tidb_enforce_mpp=1;set @@tidb_enable_null_aware_anti_join=on;
explain format = 'plan_tree' select * from t where t.a not in (select s.a from s); -- 1. anti semi join, one join key
explain format = 'plan_tree' select * from t where t.a not in (select s.a from s where t.c > s.c); -- 2. anti semi join, one join key + other condition
explain format = 'plan_tree' select * from t where (t.a, t.b) not in (select s.a, s.b from s); -- 3. anti semi join, two join key
explain format = 'plan_tree' select * from t where (t.a, t.b) not in (select s.a, s.b from s where t.c < s.c); -- 4. anti semi join, two join key + other condition
explain format = 'plan_tree' select *, t.a not in (select s.a from s) from t; -- 5. left anti semi join, one join key
explain format = 'plan_tree' select *, t.a not in (select s.a from s where t.c > s.c) from t; -- 6. left anti semi join, one join key + other condition
explain format = 'plan_tree' select *, (t.a, t.b) not in (select s.a, s.b from s) from t; -- 7. left anti semi join, two join key
explain format = 'plan_tree' select *, (t.a, t.b) not in (select s.a, s.b from s where t.c < s.c) from t; -- 8. left anti semi join, two join key + other condition
explain format = 'plan_tree' select /*+ HASH_JOIN_BUILD(s@sel_2) */  * from t where t.a not in (select s.a from s where t.c > s.c); -- 9. anti semi join, one join key + other condition + hint
explain format = 'plan_tree' select /*+ HASH_JOIN_BUILD(t@sel_1) */  * from t where t.a not in (select s.a from s where t.c > s.c); -- 10. anti semi join, one join key + other condition + hint

name: TestMPPSharedCTEScan
cases: explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select * from t) select * from c1, c1 c2 where c1.a=c2.b
explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t]) */ * from t) select * from c1, c1 c2 where c1.a=c2.b
explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select * from t) select c1.* from c1, c1 c2 where c1.b=c2.c
explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select * from t) select * from c1, c1 c2 where c1.a=c2.b limit 10
explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select * from t) select * from c1, c1 c2 where c1.a=c2.b order by c1.a limit 10
explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select * from t), c2 as (select c1.* from c1, c1 c2 where c1.b=c2.c) select * from c2 c1, c2 where c1.a=c2.b
explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t]) */ * from t), c2 as (select c1.* from c1, c1 c2 where c1.b=c2.c) select * from c2 c1, c2 where c1.a=c2.b

explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select * from t), c2 as (select c1.* from c1, c1 c2 where c1.b=c2.c) select * from c2 c1, c2, (with c3 as (select * from t) select c3.* from c3, c3 c4 where c3.c=c4.b) c3 where c1.a=c2.b and c1.a=c3.a

explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t]) */ * from t), c2 as (select c1.* from c1, c1 c2 where c1.b=c2.c) select * from c2 c1, c2, (with c3 as (select * from t) select c3.* from c3, c3 c4 where c3.c=c4.b) c3 where c1.a=c2.b and c1.a=c3.a

explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select * from t), c2 as (select c1.* from c1, c1 c2 where c1.b=c2.c) select * from c2 c1, c2, (with c3 as (select /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t]) */ * from t) select c3.* from c3, c3 c4 where c3.c=c4.b) c3 where c1.a=c2.b and c1.a=c3.a

explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select * from t), c2 as (select c1.* from c1, c1 c2 where c1.b=c2.c) select * from c2 c1, c2, (with c3 as (select * from c1) select c3.* from c3, c3 c4 where c3.c=c4.b) c3 where c1.a=c2.b and c1.a=c3.a

explain format = 'plan_tree' with c1 as (select /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t]) */ * from t), c2 as (select c1.* from c1, c1 c2 where c1.b=c2.c) select * from c2 c1, c2, (with c3 as (select * from c1) select c3.* from c3, c3 c4 where c3.c=c4.b) c3 where c1.a=c2.b and c1.a=c3.a

name: TestRollupMPP
cases: explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(1) from t group by a, b with rollup; -- 1. simple agg
explain format = 'plan_tree' select sum(c), count(1) from t group by a, b with rollup; -- 2. non-grouping set col c
explain format = 'plan_tree' select count(a) from t group by a, b with rollup; -- 3. should keep the original col a
explain format = 'plan_tree' select grouping(a) from t group by a, b with rollup; -- 4. contain grouping function ref to grouping set column a
explain format = 'plan_tree' select grouping(a,b) from t group by a, b with rollup; -- 5. grouping function contains grouping set column a,c
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a, grouping(b,a) from t group by a,b with rollup; -- 6. resolve normal column a to grouping set column a'
explain format = 'plan_tree' select a+1, grouping(b) from t group by a+1, b with rollup; -- 7. resolve field list a+1 to grouping set column a+1
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT SUM(profit) AS profit FROM sales GROUP BY year+2, year+profit WITH ROLLUP order by year+2; -- 8. order by item year+2 resolve to gby grouping expression
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT year+2, SUM(profit) AS profit FROM sales GROUP BY year+2, year+profit WITH ROLLUP order by year+2; -- 9. order by item year+2 resolve to select field

explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT year+2 as y, SUM(profit) as profit FROM sales GROUP BY year+2, year+profit WITH ROLLUP having y > 2002 order by year+2, profit; -- 10. having (year+2) shouldn't be pushed down

explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT year+2 as y, SUM(profit) AS profit, grouping(year+2) FROM sales GROUP BY year+2, year+profit WITH ROLLUP having y > 2002 order by year+2, profit; -- 11. grouping function validation

explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT year, country, product, SUM(profit) AS profit FROM sales GROUP BY year, country, product with rollup order by grouping(year); -- 12. grouping function in order by clause
explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT country, product, SUM(profit) AS profit FROM sales GROUP BY country, country, product with rollup order by grouping(country); -- 13. 12 under gpos case

explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT year, country, product, SUM(profit) AS profit FROM sales GROUP BY year, country, product with rollup having grouping(year) > 0 order by grouping(year); -- 14. grouping function in having clause

explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT country, product, SUM(profit) AS profit FROM sales GROUP BY country, country, product with rollup having grouping(country) > 0 order by grouping(country); -- 15. 14 under gpos case

explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT year, country, product, grouping(year, country, product) from sales group by year, country, product with rollup having grouping(year, country, product) <> 0; -- 16. grouping function recreating fix

name: TestEnforceMPPNewest
cases: explain format='plan_tree' select /*+ set_var(tidb_enforce_mpp=on) */ * from t1 join t2 on t1.a=t2.b where t1.a in (1,2);
explain format='plan_tree' select * from t1 join t2 on t1.a=t2.b where t1.a in (1,2);
